sp_widget.name: Tasker Modal - My Offices
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"name":"link_template","section":"Presentation","label":"Template","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"Top Icon","value":"Top Icon"},{"label":"Circle Icon","value":"Circle Icon"},{"label":"Color Box","value":"Color Box"}]},{"hint":"The title of your modal.","name":"modal_title","section":"Presentation","default_value":"My Modal","label":"Modal Title","type":"string"},{"hint":"","name":"short_description","section":"Presentation","label":"Short Description","type":"string"},{"name":"color","section":"Presentation","default_value":"--None--","label":"Bootstrap Color","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"default","value":"default"},{"label":"primary","value":"primary"},{"label":"success","value":"success"},{"label":"info","value":"info"},{"label":"warning","value":"warning"},{"label":"danger","value":"danger"}]},{"name":"class_name","section":"Presentation","label":"Bootstrap Class Name","type":"string"},{"name":"glyph","section":"Presentation","default_value":"empty","label":"Glyph","type":"glyphicon"},{"hint":"The title of the button.","name":"title","section":"Presentation","default_value":"Click here!","label":"Title","type":"string"},{"hint":"The ID of the widget you wish to embed","name":"widget_id","section":"Data","default_value":"widget-cool-clock","label":"Widget ID","type":"string"},{"hint":"The input you wish to pass to the embedded widget.","name":"widget_input","section":"Data","default_value":"{}","label":"Widget Input","type":"string"},{"hint":"Specify the size of the modal window (--None-- is default size)","name":"size","section":"Presentation","default_value":"--None--","label":"Modal Window Size","type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"xs","value":"xs"},{"label":"lg","value":"lg"}]}]
